Localization.Description: A user created a link to access a vault

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} created a link to access private vault "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} from host {src.ip} created a link to access organization vault "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
